questionHtml:
What is the ratio of the areas of the signals in the 1H NMR spectrum of pentan-3-ol?

A.     6:4:1:1

B.     6:2:2:2

C.     5:5:1:1

D.     3:3:2:2:1:1

meta.title: What is the ratio of the areas of the signals in the 1H NMR spectrum of pentan-3-ol? A. 6:4:1:1 B. 6:2:2:2 C. 5:5:1:1 D. 3:3:2:2:1:1
